parameters.query: ALTER TABLE gda_competitor_watchlist ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scoring_factors TEXT; ALTER TABLE gda_competitor_watchlist ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scored_at TIMESTAMPTZ; SELECT 1 as ok;

SELECT id, name, threat_level, COALESCE(capabilities,'') as capabilities, COALESCE(target_agencies,'') as target_agencies, COALESCE(region,'') as region, COALESCE(threat_score,0) as threat_score, COALESCE(total_obligated,'0') as total_obligated, govtribe_url FROM gda_competitor_watchlist WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY name
